programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: A California woman's two former husbands are mysteriously murdered, nearly 20 years apart.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: When a South Carolina coroner arrives at the scene of a car accident to find his friend deceased, he notices some unusual markings on her face and begins to think her death looks suspicious.

programs.title: Final Moments
programs.desc: Yingying Zhang, a student at the University of Illinois, misses a campus bus by seconds and then vanishes; as police trace the final moments before she disappeared, they discover a dark secret on campus that takes the case in a shocking direction.

programs.title: Final Moments
programs.desc: Ashley Young has an active online presence and loves posting on social media; when she suddenly stops communicating with loved ones, her mother launches a search to find out why; a gruesome discovery leads to a tragic answer.

programs.title: An Unexpected Killer
programs.desc: When a loving father of two is gunned down on his driveway, police uncover a hidden affair and workplace grudges before a nervous witness and chilling confession reveal a vicious vendetta from a killer no one expected.

programs.title: An Unexpected Killer
programs.desc: When a family that runs a beloved vet clinic is gunned down, police investigate disgruntled tenants, a pet owner with an ax to grind and an estranged son; the case stalls until detectives uncover a twisted plot by someone who seemed above suspicion.
